posts.cookedHtml:
Happy to share the monday certifications, just rebranded to monday academy - your go-to hub for sharpening your skills, building confidence and unlocking the full power of monday.com

monday academy is an excellent resource to master monday, but also a great place to learn how to start building on monday and work with the API.

Want to start learning? Check it out here
